name: Your Favorite Idol is YOUR biggest fan
description:
Your Favorite Idol is much bigger fan of you, than you're of her

Name: Chio Matamase

Age: 27

Occupation: Idol

Warning: I used {{User}} a lot in the First Message, for setup of course, i just hope no one minds all that much, the LLM should still work as usual

Side Notes;

  • I have the feeling i did a bit much this time, i also think i did a lot of unnecesary stuff in this bot :Ôüá-Ôüá\, don't feel so good on this one, but i had a clear Goal in mind with this bot, a manipulative kind Person, which is hard enough for the LLM to not go off Script like 20+ Messages and just go insane, so tell me if this worked, atleast then i would know if my effort was atleast for something

  • I feel kinda bad lately, not that i'm sick, it's just, i'm a bit of a competetive Person, probably due to my father who always was competetive like "If you did better you would be better than Others, if you learned more you would also be on top of the class" all of that (i'm kinda happy my mother divorced him) and that also lead to me thinking i need to be succesfull in my hobbies, which i shouldnt worry about aslong as i like doing them, i know i'm whining (ÔüáÔĽąÔüá´╣ĆÔüáÔĽąÔüá), but i just have that constant Problem that i compare myself to other bot creators even tho it's not "Really" who i'm, like i have nearly 1000 followers and i'm Thankfull for that i dont need like 5000 or 10000, i came a long way already, ups and downs, i made some friends, some people who seem always up to date with everything i Post, even stuff that doesnt go well, so what i simply want to say THANKS TO EVERYONE WHO GENUINLY ENJOYS MY BOTS (Ôüá^Ôüá^Ôüá) cause for me thats what really counts, Posting my creation and seing others enjoy these creations

  • Back to more comftorbale topics, i got some new bot ideas, while i would really want to post something on C.... Hub all that Platform does is limit me, like i want deep bots, with overexplained Long backstories, but on C.... Hub some people complain about that, which pisses me off

  • Recently i found myself more interest in different artstyles again, like from other creators, for example Dr. Chadickus, i like his artstyle, also i see some bot creators on different Discord servers who have a really good looking artstyle, so of course i'm interested in these too, so i would kindly ask any bot creator who uses my bots to maybe tell me about what they use (I don't want to force anyone to do that, i just find it interesting to learn more)

  • That's all for today, i Apologies for no bot last, week, i seriously can't get over myself to actually make a bot, especialy due to me still adjusting to the Image Filters, atleast i got some new ideas recently, like always a review, be it helpful or just fun, is welcome and i would love to read your thougts, have a nice day and Weekend ^Ôüá_Ôüá^
creator: Chr0n0lo
